technical_replicate: we performed a quantitative proteomics study employing native stable isotope labeling by amino acids in cell culture (SILAC)
experimental_design: wild-type and Δola1 cells were subjected to mild heat stress (42 °C, 60 min) and compared with control cells (30 °C)
factor_value: genotype (wild-type, Δola1) and condition (heat stress, control)
wild-type and Δola1 cells were subjected to mild heat stress (42 °C, 60 min)
